'''âb-g-p-v''' ('''kabagpevoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:wallflower|wallflower]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-g-p-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wallflower|wallflower]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âb-g-p-v
|-
! Lemma
| kabagpevoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thibagpevoko|thibagpevoko]] || [[word:jibagpevoko|jibagpevoko]] || [[word:shibagpevoko|shibagpevoko]] || [[word:kibagpevoko|kibagpevoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthubagpevoko|thuthubagpevoko]] || [[word:jujubagpevoko|jujubagpevoko]] || [[word:shushubagpevoko|shushubagpevoko]] || [[word:kukubagpevoko|kukubagpevoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thubagpevoko|thubagpevoko]] || [[word:jubagpevoko|jubagpevoko]] || [[word:shubagpevoko|shubagpevoko]] || [[word:kubagpevoko|kubagpevoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thobagpevoko|thobagpevoko]] || [[word:jobagpevoko|jobagpevoko]] || [[word:shobagpevoko|shobagpevoko]] || [[word:kobagpevoko|kobagpevoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thobagpevoko|thobagpevoko]] || [[word:jobagpevoko|jobagpevoko]] || [[word:shobagpevoko|shobagpevoko]] || [[word:kobagpevoko|kobagpevoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠbagpevoko|thĂŠbagpevoko]] || [[word:jĂŠbagpevoko|jĂŠbagpevoko]] || [[word:shĂŠbagpevoko|shĂŠbagpevoko]] || [[word:kĂŠbagpevoko|kĂŠbagpevoko]]
|-

|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thabagpevoko|thabagpevoko]] || [[word:jabagpevoko|jabagpevoko]] || [[word:shabagpevoko|shabagpevoko]] || [[word:kabagpevoko|kabagpevoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thabagpevoko|thabagpevoko]] || [[word:jabagpevoko|jabagpevoko]] || [[word:shabagpevoko|shabagpevoko]] || [[word:kabagpevoko|kabagpevoko]]

=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
